g.text: W = (P, D, S, L, H, A, B): parameters, tokens, layers, heads, batch
H = (F, BW, C, TDP): FLOP/s, bandwidth, capacity, power
6 domains, each wall = physical/logical constraint with a grounded equation
W1 Compute W2 Memory W3 Software W4 Serving
W5 Batching W6 Streaming W7 Tail Latency
W8 Ingestion W9 Transformation W10 Locality
W11 Complexity W12 Reasoning W13 Fidelity
W14 Communication W15 Fragility W16 Multi-tenant
W21 Sensitivity: partial derivatives to find binding constraint
W22 Synthesis: inverse solve for hardware requirements
Dimensional enforcement: every quantity carries SI units at runtime via pint
each resolver: pure f(config) to metrics, full evaluation <0.3s
All outputs produced in <0.3s on a laptop. No GPU required.
